1.1: Bann proverb Salomon, garson David, lerwa Izrael.
1.2: Finn ekrir sa bann proverb-la pou ansegn lasazes ek pou donn enn bon ledikasion, pou donn bann bon parol ki ekler lespri,
1.3: pou montre kouma pou viv enn lavi drwat, pou pratik lazistis ek viv onet;
1.4: pou ed bann ignoran pran prekosion, pou donn bann zenes konesans ek kapasite pou reflesi.
1.5: Si kikenn deza saz, les li ekoute kanmem, pou so konesans ogmante; mem si kikenn deza ena disernman, sa pou ed li viv enn lavi drwat;
1.6: li ava aprann bann proverb ek zot sinifikasion; li ava konpran parol bann saz ek zot sans.
1.7: Rekonet lotorite LESEGNER, samem komansman konesans; zis bann vantar ki ignor lasazes ek bon ledikasion.
1.8: Mo zanfan, ekout konsey to papa, pa rezet lansegnman to mama.
1.9: Zot pou kouma enn kouronn lor to latet; kouma enn zoli kolie otour to likou.
1.10: Mo zanfan, si move dimoun rod tant twa, pa rant dan zot piez.
1.11: Si zot dir twa: “Vinn ar nou pou atak antret ek pou vers disan; vinn kasiet ar nou pou nou tom lor bann inosan e touy zot par plezir.
1.12: Anou aval zot antie; fer zot rant dan zot tom enn fwa.
1.13: Nou pou vinn ris ar zot bann dibien; nou pou ranpli nou lakaz ar lobze kokin.
1.14: Partner, rant dan nou korom, kan nou kas-fann # 1:14 Partaz kas. , twa osi to pou gagn to par.”
1.15: Mo zanfan, pa mars lor zot sime, evit pran zot larout.
1.16: Zot pe prese pou al fer krim, zot pe degaze pou vers disan.
1.17: Initil to met latrap pou may zwazo, kan zwazo la pe trouv twa.
1.18: Bann move dimoun atak antret; marke-garde, zot prop disan ki pou verse. Zot kasiet pou touy bann inosan, me zot prop lavi ki pou menase.
1.19: Ala ki manier bann ki vinn ris par violans pou fini: rises ki zot gagne dan krim pou pran zot prop lavi.
1.20: Lasazes pe kriye for-for dan lari; So lavwa domine dan bann plas piblik.
1.21: Li pe kriye dan tapaz lavil; Dan lantre lavil, li pe dir:
1.22: “Bann bet, Komie letan ankor zot pou kontan zot betiz? Komie letan ankor bann insolan pou kontign insilte? Komie letan ankor bann inbesil pou ignor konesans?
1.23: Pran kont mo bann repros, mo ava donn twa mo konesans; mo ava grav mo parol dan to leker.
1.24: Kan mo finn apel zot, zot pa finn ekoute; Kan mo finn ouver mo lebra, zot finn vir zot ledo;
1.25: zot pa finn aksepte mo bann konsey; e zot finn rezet mo bann repros.
1.26: Fer atansion! Mwa ki pou riy zot kan zot pou dan maler; Mo pou boufonn zot kan zot pou dan lafreyer.
1.27: Kan panik tom lor zot kouma siklonn, Kan katastrof sezi zot kouma tanpet, Kan traka ek detres anglouti zot,
1.28: lerla, zot pou rod mo led, me mo pa pou reponn; zot pou rod mo sekour, me zot pa pou trouv mwa.
1.29: Parski zot ti ignor konesans, e zot ti refiz respekte LESEGNER .
1.30: Zot finn rezet mo konsey; e zot finn ignor mo bann repros.
1.31: Asterla, zot pou pey konsekans zot betiz, zot pou degout zot lavi ar zot bann move aksion.
1.32: Bann ti-lespri pou mor dan zot mesanste, bann fezer pou detrir ar zot prop lorgey.
1.33: Me seki ekout mo parol, li pou an-sekirite, li pou viv lwin ar maler e dan trankilite.”

2.1: Mo zanfan, pran kont mo parol; gard mo bann instriksion kouma enn trezor.
2.2: Ouver to zorey ekout lasazes, e grav so mesaz dan to leker.
2.3: Wi, kontign sipliye pou to gagn disernman, pa aret insiste pou to gagn konpreansion.
2.4: Mo zanfan, rod lasazes kouma larzan, resers li kouma enn trezor.
2.5: Lerla, to pou konn respekte LESEGNER e vremem, to ava konn Bondie.
2.6: Parski LESEGNER , limem lasours lasazes, so parol donn konesans ek disernman.
2.7: Li enn gran proteksion pou dimoun drwat; li enn boukliye pou dimoun onet.
2.8: Li vey sime bann ki fer lazistis, li protez larout so bann fidel.
2.9: Si to pran kont tousala, lerla, to pou konn ladrwatir ek lazistis, to pou konpran lonette ek bon manier viv.
2.10: Alor, lasazes pou ranpli to leker, konesans pou ranpli to lespri ar lazwa.
2.11: Lerla, to bon rezonnman pou gid twa, to disernman pou protez twa.
2.12: Li pou anpes twa mars lor sime lemal, li pou prezerv twa kont bann manter,
2.13: kont bann ki abandonn sime lazistis, e ki mars dan sime marenwar.
2.14: Zot gagn plezir dan fer pese, ek lazwa dan fer lemal;
2.15: Zot finn swazir sime traver, e zot konportman pa drwat.
2.16: Me twa, pa les twa rant dan siro bann move fam, bann fam move lavi ki anbobinn bon dimoun ar zot parol dou.
2.17: Zot abandonn zot mari marye, e zot pa respekte serman sakre zot maryaz.
2.18: Si to swiv sime so lakaz, to pou al trouv lamor; Si to mars lor so larout, to pou al dan marenwar.
2.19: Seki al kot li, zot gagn sime rantre, me pena sime sorti; zot pa pou kapav retourn dan sime lavi.
2.20: Alor, swiv sime bon dimoun, e imit bann ki pratik lazistis.
2.21: Zis bann dimoun drwat ki pou viv dan nou pei; zis bann dimoun ki lame prop # 2:21 “Lame prop” vedir bann dimoun ki “san repros”. , ki pou res isi.
2.22: Bann malfeter pou bizin lev pake ale; Bann tret pou bizin demenaze.

3.1: Mo zanfan, pa bliye mo lansegnman, dan fon to leker, to ava gard mo bann komannman.
3.2: Koumsa, to pou viv lontan e to pou ere dan to lavi.
3.3: Pa les sinserite ek fidelite kit twa; Atas zot otour to likou; grav zot dan to leker.
3.4: Alor, Bondie ek bann dimoun pou kontan twa, e zot pou estim twa.
3.5: Zame pa krwar ki to enn gran koneser; me fer LESEGNER konfians ar tou to leker.
3.6: Rekonet li dan tou to proze, e li pou ekler to sime.
3.7: Zame pa krwar ki to tro saz; me respekte LESEGNER ek evit lemal.
3.8: Sa pou geri to blesir; sa pou fortifie to lekor.
3.9: Glorifie LESEGNER ar tou seki to posede; ofer li premie rekolt to karo.
3.10: Lerla, to grenie pou garni ar manze; to damzann pou ranpli ar divin.
3.11: Mo zanfan, pa mepriz disiplinn LESEGNER ; pa vir ledo ar so repros;
3.12: parski LESEGNER koriz sa enn ki li kontan-la; parey kouma enn paran koriz zanfan ki li prefere.
3.13: Li ere sa dimoun ki dekouver lasazes la; e ki ena lintelizans pou konpran.
3.14: Seki lasazes donn li, pli presie ki larzan, e so valer pli for ki lor.
3.15: Lasazes pli presie ki bann bizou gran valer, li pli inportan ki tou seki enn dimoun kapav dezire dan so leker.
3.16: Enn kote, li ed nou pou viv lontan; lot kote, li donn nou larises ek loner.
3.17: Li enn gran plezir pou mars lor sime lasazes, so bann santie donn lazwa ek lape.
3.18: Lasazes kouma enn pie ki donn lavi bann ki trap li; bann ki konn gard lasazes, pou apel zot bienere.
3.19: LESEGNER , dan so sazes, finn kre later; avek so konesans, li finn kre lesiel.
3.20: Par so kapasite, li finn fer dilo souterin sourse, e li finn fer niaz devers lapli.
3.21: Mo zanfan, atas twa ar lasazes ek lintelizans; Pa les zot kit twa enn pous.
3.22: Zot pou donn twa enn zoli lavi; zot pou kouma enn kolie gran valer otour to likou.
3.23: Lerla, to sime pou kler ek sir, e to lipie pa pou kogn ar ros.
3.24: Ler to pe alonze, to pa pou gagn per; e lor to lili, to pou dormi trankil.
3.25: Pa bizin per kan tanpet bate; pa trakase kan siklonn kraz lor bann move dimoun.
3.26: LESEGNER pou protez twa; li pou anpes to lipie rant dan piez.
3.27: Zame pa refiz ed bann dimoun ki merite; fer dibien tank to kapav.
3.28: Pa dir to vwazin: “pase plitar,” kan to bien kapav ed li asterlamem.
3.29: Pa tir plan pou fer ditor to vwazin, ki viv pre kot twa e ki fer twa konfians.
3.30: Pa tir lay ar enn dimoun ki zame finn fer twa ditor.
3.31: Pa zalou enn dimoun violan, e pa swiv so manier.
3.32: LESEGNER deteste pese bann dimoun move, me li estim bann ki onet.
3.33: LESEGNER modi fami bann move dimoun; me li beni fami bann ki viv dan drwatir.
3.34: Li mepriz bann vantar ek bann arogan; me li donn so faver bann ki mars dan limilite.
3.35: Bann saz gagn loner ek bon repitasion; Bann vantar fini dan laont.

4.1: Mo zanfan, ekout konsey to paran; fer atansion, e to pou gagn disernman.
4.2: Mo pe donn twa bon konsey; pa les li glise ale kouma dilo lor bredsonz.
4.3: Mwa osi mo ti enn ti-garson pou mo papa; Mo mama ti gat mwa kouma enn zanfan inik.
4.4: Mo papa ti ansegn mwa, e ti dir mwa: “Grav mo bann parol dan to leker; rapel bien mo konsey e to pou viv bien.
4.5: Rod touzour lasazes ek disernman; pa vir ledo ar mo bann parol.
4.6: Pa abandonn lasazes e li pou protez twa; kontan li e li pou vey lor twa.
4.7: Pou to vinn saz, devlop lasazes dan twa; rod disernman, parski li pli inportan ki tou seki to posede.
4.8: Kontan lasazes e to pou vinn inportan. Ser li for, napa large, e to pou gagn loner.
4.9: Lasazes pou kouma enn girland zoli fler lor to fron; li pou kouma enn zoli kouronn lor to latet.”
4.10: Mo zanfan, ekout mwa; pran kont mo parol, e to pou viv lontan.
4.11: Mo finn ansegn twa sime lasazes; mo finn gid twa lor larout ladrwatir.
4.12: Ler to fer demars pou fer kitsoz, laport pou ouver pou twa; ler to fer to proze, pa pou ena baryer lor to sime. # 4:12 Konpar sa verse la avek Zob 18:7.
4.13: Gard dan to memwar lansegnman ki to finn gagne; napa les li sape. Vey li bien, kouma to vey to prop lavi.
4.14: Pa imit bann move dimoun; pa azir kouma bann malfeter.
4.15: Mo piti! Pa frekant zot sime; pran lot direksion, e kontign to larout.
4.16: Bann move dimoun pa kapav dormi tanki zot pa fer lemal; zot pa gagn somey tanki zot pa fer enn dimoun ditor.
4.17: Zot viv ar mesanste kouma zot dipin; zot pran laviolans kouma zot divin.
4.20: Zanfan, pran kont mo parol; ekout bien mo bann konsey;
4.21: gard to lizie fixe lor zot; grav zot dan fon to leker.
4.22: Tou seki met mo bann parol ek mo bann konsey an-pratik, zot pou viv enn bon lavi; zot pa pou met malad dan zot lekor.
4.23: Vey bien bann panse ki sorti dan to leker; samem lasours lavi.
4.24: Pa les mansonz sorti dan to labous; pa les to lalang bate pou koz ninport.
4.25: Fixe to lizie drwat divan twa; pa les to regar fann de kote.
4.26: Get bien kot to met to lipie; lerla, to sir to pa pou kogne.
4.27: Pa devie ni adrwat ni agos; pa koste ar sime lemal.

5.1: Mo zanfan, pran kont mo bann parol sazes; ouver zorey pou ekout mo bann konsey.
5.2: Koumsa, to pou gagn disernman; e bann bon parol pou sorti dan to labous.
5.3: Fer atansion! Enn fam adilter, dan so labous, koumadir ena dimiel; so koze pli dou ki siro.
5.4: Me alafin, li vinn amer kouma mazanbron # 5:4 Mazanbron: Enn plant ki bien amer. ; li fite kouma kouto mousana # 5:4 Kouto mousana: Enn kouto ki koup de kote. .
5.5: Si to swiv li, li pou trenn twa dan lamor; so sime desann direk dan lafos.
5.6: Li pa finn swazir sime lavi; li pa mem kone ki li dan sime perdision.
5.7: Asterla, mo piti, ekout mwa; pa rezet mo konsey.
5.8: Pa koste ar fam move lavi; pa les laport so lakaz tant twa.
5.9: Sinon, to pou perdi to repitasion; e bann dimoun san-pitie pou tir to lavi.
5.10: Lerla, bann etranze ki pou profit to rises; lezot ki pou zwir dibien ki to finn ramase ar to laswer.
5.11: Finalman, kan maladi pou devor to lekor; kan to trouv to lavi pe ale, to pou plengne.
5.12: Lerla, to pou dir: “Kifer mo finn vir ledo ar bann avertisman? Kifer mo pa finn pran kont bann repros?
5.13: Mo finn ignor parol mo bann edikater; mo finn rezet bann instriksion mo profeser.
5.14: Asterla, mo dan bor presipis; mo loner finn rwine dan lasosiete.”
5.15: Dan to lakaz, to fam kouma enn lasours dilo kler ki prop. Pa al bwar andeor! Kot tomem ena enn basin dilo fre; rafresi twa.
5.16: Pa kit to semans dan tou kwin lari; oubien dan bann plas piblik.
5.17: Rezerv to plezir zis pou to fam; pa partaz li avek bann etranze.
5.18: To fam marye, li kouma enn lasours beni; zwir lavi ek trouv to lazwa ar li.
5.19: To fam ena enn bon leker, li enn bote; ki so lekor atir twa, ki so lamour rann twa fou.
5.20: Napa rod plezir ar bann fam move lavi; pa les twa atire ar lekor enn fam ki tronp so mari.
5.21: Pa bliye, LESEGNER trouv tou seki bann imin fer; li okouran tou zot bann aksion.
5.22: Bann malfeter may dan latrap zot prop erer; zot tas dan file zot prop pese.
5.23: Zot pou perdi lavi parski zot mank disiplinn; zot pou al dan perdision parski zot foli tro gran.

6.1: Mo zanfan, si to finn dibout garanti pou enn vwazin, savedir ki to finn donn to parol.
6.2: To prop labous finn piez twa; to prop parol finn koulout twa.
6.3: To finn vinn esklav enn kaser. Alor, ala seki to bizin fer: Pa tike, al get li ek sipliy li.
6.4: Pa les somey trap twa; Pa les to popier vinn lour.
6.5: Galoupe kouma enn serf divan so predater; Ras lavi # 6:5 “Ras lavi”, li enn expresion kreol ki vedir: Galoup vit pou sov to lavi. kouma enn zwazo divan zarm saser.
6.6: Twa ki pares, obzerv enn fourmi; fer kouma li, e to pou vinn saz.
6.7: Enn fourmi pena sef; li pena ni formenn ni patron.
6.8: Pourtan, li ramas manze dan lete; li ranpli so grenie dan bon sezon.
6.9: Ala to pares la! Ziska kan to pou res lor to lili? Kan to pou deside pou fer enn mouv?
6.10: To kas enn ti somey, to fer enn ti lasies; to kas enn poz, to krwaz to lebra.
6.11: Letansa, lamizer pou tom lor twa kouma enn voler. Lafin, laswaf pou atak twa kouma enn bandi.
6.12: Voryen ek malfeter, pas zot letan fann mansonz.
6.13: Zot pez lizie, zot pil lipie, e zot klak ledwa pou anbet zot viktim.
6.14: Zot tir plan modi ar lespri malsin; kot zot pase zot fann dezord.
6.15: Akoz sa, maler pou tom lor zot antret; okenn remed pa pou sap zot lavi.
6.20: Mo zanfan, gard bann komannman to papa; pa bliye bann bon konsey to mama.
6.21: Grav zot touletan dan fon to leker; atas zot otour to likou.
6.22: Kan to marse, zot pou gid twa; kan to dormi, zot pou vey lor twa; e kan to leve, zot pou konsey twa.
6.23: Bann komannman-la kouma enn lalanp dan marenwar; bann lansegnman-la kouma enn lalimier dan lobskirite. Bann repros ek disiplinn pou ouver sime lavi pou twa.
6.24: Zot pou protez twa kont fam move lavi; Zot pou prezerv twa kont bann parol dimiel fam adilter.
6.25: Pa les to leker atire ar so bote; Pa les twa gate ar so regar.
6.26: Enn prostitie kapav donn twa so lekor pou enn bouse manze; me avek fam enn lot zom, to kapav perdi to lavi.
6.27: Si kikenn sarye labrez dan so pos, eski so linz pa pou pran dife?
6.28: Si kikenn mars lor dife, eski so lipie pa pou brile?
6.29: Li parey pou enn zom ki dormi ar fam so prosin; si li fer sa, so konsekans pou bien ser.
6.30: Kan kikenn kokin, zis pou kalme so lafin, nou pa tro blam li;
6.31: me si proprieter may li, so santans sever. Li pou konfiske tou seki li posede.
6.32: Me enn zom ki komet adilter, li finn perdi larezon; kan li fer sa, li detrir so prop lavi.
6.33: Sa zom-la pou gagn bate, e so repitasion pou gate; touletan li pou viv dan laont ek dezoner.
6.34: Enn zom, kan so fam tronp li, li zalou e li ankoler; lerla, so vanzans pou terib.
6.35: Li pa pou aksepte dedomazman; okenn kado, ser kouma li ser, pa pou tengn so koler.

7.1: Mo zanfan, pa bliye mo parol; gard mo bann komannman dan profon to leker.
7.2: Si to gard mo bann komannman, to pou viv lontan; gard mo bann lansegnman kouma to pli gran trezor.
7.3: Gard zot touletan, kouma enn bag dan to ledwa; grav zot lor lardwaz to leker.
7.4: Pran lasazes kouma to prop ser; konsider disernman kouma to meyer kamarad.
7.5: Lasazes ek disernman pou protez twa kont bann fam ki amenn move lavi. Fam adilter ena bann parol dimiel; lasazes ek disernman pou protez twa kont zot.
7.6: Enn fwa, kot lafnet dan mo lakaz, mo pe get deor.
7.7: Mo pe obzerv bann zennzan ale-vini. Zot paret san lexperyans; parmi, ena enn ti zenes san bonsans.
7.8: Li pe pas kot enn lakrwaze. Ayo! Mo trouv li pran sime lakaz enn fam adilter.
7.9: Soley finn kouse, aswar pe vini; pe fer deplizanpli som.
7.10: Mo trouv enn fam koste ar li; so labiyman extra sexi; enn sou laont li pena.
7.11: Li koz for-for ek li san pider. So lipie grate dan lakaz, li pa kapav res anplas.
7.12: Timama dan lari, timama kot bazar; li nek veye dan tou ti kwin lari pou piez bann ti zenes.
7.13: Li may tilom la, li anbras li; e li dir li avek enn lasirans:
7.14: “Mo ti ena enn sakrifis aksiondegras pou ofer; mo finn tini mo promes zordi. Mo ena bon laviann kot mwa # 7:14 Kan ti ofer enn sakrifis aksiondegras, enn parti laviann la ti ofer Bondie. Seki ti ofer sakrifis la ti bizin manz lot parti la. Li ti bizin manz tou, mem zour, oubien lendeme sakrifis-la. Get Levitik 7: 11 - 17. .
7.15: Mo ti pe rod twa partou; to mem ki mo bizin; aster mo finn trouv twa, mo bien kontan.
7.16: Mo finn prepar mo lili avek enn zoli dra; mo dra exotik, an-lin ki sorti Lezip.
7.17: Mo finn parfim mo lili, avek parfin lamir, lalwes ek kanel.
7.18: Vinn ar mwa! Anou dormi ansam ziska gramatin. Les nou profit sa plezir la ansam.
7.19: Pa traka twa, mo mari pa la; li finn al an-vwayaz pou enn long letan.
7.20: Li finn sarye boukou lamone; li pa pou retourne avan plennlinn.”
7.21: Fam-la reysi met tilom dan siro; li atir li ar so bann parol dou.
7.22: Ti zenes-la nek swiv li deswit; li ale, kouma enn bef pe al labatwar, so latet bese koumadir serf pe al rant dan piez,
7.23: ziska ki enn dibwa pwint transpers so lekor. Li kouma enn zwazo ki pe fons dan file; li pa kone ki so lavi andanze.
7.24: Asterla, mo piti, ekout mwa bien; ekout bien sak parol ki mo pe dir:
7.25: Pa les to leker derape lor so sime, pa les to lipie egare dan so lale.
7.26: Boukou finn zwenn tase avan twa; boukou finn trouv lamor, mem si zot ti for.
7.27: Si to rant dan so lakaz, koumadir to finn pas par laport lamor; li amenn twa direk dan lemond bann mor.

8.1: Ekoute! Lasazes pe kriye for-for; disernman pe lev so lavwa.
8.2: Lor bann oter, dan bor sime lor lakrwaze, lasazes pe diboute.
8.3: Dan lantre lavil, divan bann laport, li pe kriye:
8.4: “Ekout mwa, tou imin ki lor later; mo pe lans zot tou enn lapel:
8.5: Zot, bann ti-lespri, aprann gagn disernman; zot ki ankor bet, aprann vinn intelizan.
8.6: Ouver zorey! Ekoute! Tou seki mo pe dir inportan; mo pou pronons bann parol sir.
8.7: Dan mo labous, laverite ki koule; mo lalev deteste tou koze mansonz.
8.8: Mo pe dir zot bann parol laverite; mo pa koz manti ek mo pa tronp dimoun.
8.9: Bann ki ena lespri trouv mo bann parol kler; bann ki ena bon konesans trouv mo koze korek.
8.10: Swazir mo bann lansegnman; zot vo plis ki larzan; swazir osi konesans; li vo plis ki lor pir.
8.11: Mwa, lasazes, mo ena plis valer ki bann bizou; mo pli presie ki tou seki zot kapav dezire.”
8.12: Mwa, lasazes, mo viv avek prekosion; mo devlop konesans atraver boukou refleksion.
8.13: Kan nou respekte LESEGNER , nou deteste lemal. Mwa, lasazes, mo deteste lorgey ek larogans; mo pa siport lemal ek mansonz.
8.14: Mo donn bon konsey ek bon rezonnman, mo ena boukou pwisans ek disernman.
8.15: Grasa mwa, bann lerwa regne; grasa mwa, bann dirizan pas bon lalwa.
8.16: Grasa mwa, bann dirizan gouverne; e bann ziz rann bon zizman.
8.17: Mo kontan seki kontan mwa; e bann ki fer zefor rod mwa, pou trouv mwa.
8.18: Mwa ki donn larises ek loner; mwa ki donn prosperite ek bann dibien ki dire.
8.19: Kado mo done vo plis ki lor, mem lor ki pli bon kalite; mo bann don vo boukou plis ki larzan meyer kalite.
8.20: Mo mars lor sime ladrwatir, lor sime lazistis.
8.21: Mo donn larises seki kontan mwa; mo ranpli zot kof ar trezor.
8.22: LESEGNER ti kre mwa dan komansman; mo premie parmi so bann aksion ki li finn fer, ena bien lontan.
8.23: Ena bien lontan, avan mem ki later ti existe, LESEGNER ti kre mo lekzistans.
8.24: Kan mo ti pran nesans, pa ti ankor ena losean; pa ti ankor ena lasours ek labondans dilo.
8.25: Mo ti la, avan ki ti donn bann montagn zot form; avan ki ti met bann kolinn anplas.
8.26: Li ti kre mwa avan ki li ti kre later ek bann plantasion; e avan ki ti ena premie grin lapousier.
8.27: Kan li ti kre lesiel, kan li ti tras lorizon lor lamer, mo ti la.
8.28: Kan li ti met bann niaz dan lesiel; kan li ti ouver robine lasours dilo, mo ti la.
8.29: Kan li ti tras frontier lamer, anpes li depas so limit; kan li ti plas bann fondasion later, mo ti la.
8.30: Mo ti touzour akote li, kouma enn arsitek; touletan, mo ti fer tou pou fer li plezir; e so prezans ti donn mwa enn gran lazwa.
8.31: Li enn gran plezir viv dan lemond ki li finn kre; li enn gran lazwa viv kot bann imin.
8.32: Asterla, ekout mwa mo bann zanfan: bienere zot, ki mars dan mo sime.
8.33: Ekout mo bann konsey; zame pa rezet bann konsey-la, e zot pou vinn saz.
8.34: Zot bienere, tou dimoun ki ekout mo parol; seki toulezour divan mo laport, e seki touletan dan lantre mo lakaz.
8.35: Sa enn ki aksepte mwa la, li ava viv lontan; e li ava gagn faver LESEGNER ;
8.36: Me dimoun ki rezet mwa, li fer limem dimal; dimoun ki pa kontan mwa, li kontan lamor.

9.1: Lasazes finn konstrir so lakaz; li finn met set kolonn tini li.
9.2: Li finn prepar laviann ek divin; li finn dres so latab pou festin.
9.3: Li finn avoy so bann servant kriye dan bann plas piblik:
9.4: “Zot ki ignoran, vinn par isi! Zot ki ti-lespri, lasazes pe dir zot:
9.5: Vini, vini! Vinn manz mo dipin; vinn bwar divin ki mo finn prepare.
9.6: Aret fer kouma ignoran, e zot pou viv lontan; mars lor sime disernman!”
9.7: Kan to koriz enn insolan, to gagn maltrete; kan to kritik enn move dimoun, to gagn insilte.
9.8: Pa kritik enn insolan; li pou deteste twa. Me si to pas enn remark enn saz, li pou kontan twa.
9.9: Konsey enn saz, e li pou vinn pli saz; ansegn enn dimoun drwat, e li pou vinn pli intelizan.
9.10: Rekonet lotorite LESEGNER , samem komansman lasazes # 9:10 Konpar proverb 1:7. ; si to konn Sa Enn ki sin-la, to deza ena bon zizman.
9.11: Wi! Mwa, lasazes ki pe dir sa! Ar mwa, to pou viv pli lontan; to lavi pou vinn pli long par boukou lane.
9.12: Si to saz, twa ki pou gagn lavantaz; me si to viv dan linsolans, to pou bizin pey konsekans.
9.13: Stipidite, li kouma enn fam ki fer tapaz dan vid; li enn ignoran ek li pa konpran.
9.14: Li nek kas poz divan lakaz, oubien kot bazar lor baz.
9.15: Li vey lokazion pou apel bann pasan ki dan zot lokipasion.
9.16: Li dir ar bann ignoran: “Vinn fer enn letour kot mwa!” Li dir ar bann ti-lespri:
9.17: “Dilo ki pa pou twa, so gou pli dou; Manze ki to manz an-sekre gagn pli bon gou.”
9.18: Me so bann viktim pa kone ki laba, kot li, ena lamor ki pe fer letour; bann ki finn rant kot li avan, zot deza dan lemond bann mor.

10.1: Bann zanfan saz fer leker zot paran kontan; zanfan bet fer leker zot paran fermal.
10.2: Rises mal-gagne fer lavi amer; me enn lavi onet tir twa dan piez lamor.
10.3: LESEGNER pa pou les bon dimoun mordefin; me li pou anpes bann malfeter akonpli zot move dezir.
10.4: Lame enn dimoun pares amenn lamizer; me lame enn bon travayer amenn larises.
10.5: Li enn loner pou dimoun ki rekolte dan bon sezon; me li enn laont pou dimoun ki dormi dan sezon rekolt.
10.6: Benediksion pou lor latet bann bon dimoun; me laviolans sort dan labous bann leker sal.
10.7: Souvenir enn bon dimoun rann nou ere. Me kan enn malfeter mor, bien vit nou bliye so nom.
10.8: Dimoun saz ek rezonab ekout bon konsey; me enn bet ki koz ninport fini dan presipis.
10.9: Dimoun onet viv an-sekirite; me bann malonet zwenn tase.
10.10: Dimoun ki pez lizie pou anbet lezot, amenn problem; bann ki pa per pou korize, amenn lape.
10.11: Parol bon dimoun kouma enn lasours ki donn lavi; me parol enn malfeter kasiet boukou violans.
10.12: Laenn alim dife; lamour pardonn erer.
10.13: Bann dimoun intelizan pronons bann bon parol; me bann ki koz ninport merit enn pinision.
10.14: Dimoun ki saz gard konesans kouma enn trezor; me kan ti-lespri koze, larwinn zame lwin.
10.15: Dibien enn ris protez li kouma enn fortres; lamizer enn pov ronz li kouma karya.
10.16: Lapey enn dimoun onet amenn nouvo lavi; lapey enn dimoun malonet servi pou fer pese.
10.17: Seki ekoute kan koriz li, li progrese lor sime lavi; seki zame aksepte so erer, li perdi so sime.
10.18: Seki kasiet laenn dan so leker, li enn manter; e seki fann fos rimer, li enn palabrer.
10.19: Plis to koz boukou, plis to ena risk fer pese; enn saz konn kontrol so lalang.
10.20: Parol enn bon dimoun, li kouma metal presie; lespri dimoun malsin, li kouma enn drom vid.
10.21: Parol bann zis, nouri boukou dimoun; me bann bet mor par zot prop betiz.
10.22: Benediksion LESEGNER amenn larises; me pa latristes # 10:22 Me pa latristes: Ena tradiksion dir: “Zis travay dir pa fer twa vinn pli ris.” .
10.23: Dimoun ti-lespri gagn plezir dan pratik lemal; dimoun ki ena rezonnman gagn plezir dan pratik lasazes.
10.24: Dimoun drwat gagn seki zot dezire; move dimoun gagn seki zot plis per.
10.25: Tanpet vini, move dimoun anvole; me bon dimoun touletan reziste.
10.26: Dimoun pares minn zot anplwayer, parey kouma lafime bril lizie, e vineg fer ledan grinse.
10.27: Dimoun ki respekte LESEGNER pou viv pli lontan; me bann malfeter pou mor avan ler.
10.28: Lespwar bon dimoun donn zot lazwa; move dimoun pena lavenir ditou.
10.29: LESEGNER protez bann bon dimoun ar pwisans; me li detrir bann dimoun ki fer lemal.
10.30: Dimoun drwat pou viv an-sekirite; dimoun traver pou zwenn tase.
10.31: Bann dimoun drwat koz langaz lasazes; me bann ki ena lalang manter pou gagn pinision.
10.32: Parol bann bon dimoun fer plezir; mansonz bann move dimoun fer soufer.

11.1: LESEGNER deteste bann ki fos zot balans; me sa fer li plezir kan servi enn pwa ki zis.
11.2: Lorgey atir dezoner; me limilite atir lasazes.
11.3: Enn bon dimoun mars touzour dan lonette; me enn malonet mor ar so prop mesanste.
11.4: Kan Bondie pou rann so zizman, to rises pa pou sov twa; me lonette ek fidelite kapav prezerv to lavi.
11.5: Enn dimoun onet pratik lazistis e so sime drwat; me enn malonet fouy so prop tom.
11.6: Lonette enn bon dimoun pou sap so lavi; me enn malonet pou may dan so prop piez.
11.7: Kan enn move dimoun mor, so lespwar osi anvole; konfians ki li ti ena dan so rises, disparet kouma lafime.
11.8: Enn dimoun ki drwat ek fidel, pa pou gagn problem; me move dimoun atir traka lor limem.
11.9: Parol move dimoun amenn larwinn lor so prosin; me lexperyans enn saz tir li dan petrin.
11.10: Kan bon dimoun prospere, lepep selebre; e kan move dimoun mor, lepep dir: “granmersi.”
11.11: Bann bon dirizan atir benediksion Bondie, ek pei progrese; me mansonz bann move dirizan devir pei anbalao.
11.12: To bet, si to fer vantar ar to prosin; bann dimoun ki ena disernman kone kan bizin res trankil.
11.13: Enn dimoun palab pou devwal to sekre; enn dimoun sinser merit to konfians.
11.14: Enn nasion san direksion pou tom dan nwar; kan ena boukou bon konseye, laviktwar asire.
11.15: Pa dibout garan pou enn etranze, to pou regrete; to lavi pou pli trankil si to refize.
11.16: Enn zoli fam ki viv bien gagn loner; enn zom debrouyar gagn rises.
11.17: Bann bon dimoun pou gagn zot rekonpans; bann malfeter atir zot prop maler.
11.18: Bann move dimoun travay pou nanye; dimoun ki fer dibien, enn zour pou dan bien.
11.19: Seki res ferm dan sime lazistis pou viv; me seki galoup deryer lemal pou mor.
11.20: LESEGNER deteste bann dimoun ki ena leker sal; me bann ki viv drwat fer li plezir.
11.21: Marke-garde, move dimoun pou gagn pinision; me bon dimoun pa pou konn kondanasion.
11.22: Enn zoli fam ki pena bonsans, so bote kouma enn bizou lor nene koson.
11.23: Enn bon dimoun dezir zis seki bon; enn malfeter atir touzour lakoler lezot.
11.24: Ena ki donn avek bon leker, e zot vinn pli ris; ena ki peng # 11:24 Peng vedir “pa kontan partaze” oubien “pa kontan depanse.” , me zot vinn pli pov.
11.25: Dimoun ki zenere pou prospere; seki donn lezot enn ver dilo, zame pa pou gagn swaf.
11.26: Lepep modi bann komersan ki atann pri monte pou vande; me zot onor marsan ki pa get zis profi.
11.27: Dimoun ki fer dibien gagn faver; me seki pratik lemal gagn maler.
11.28: Seki met zot konfians dan zot rises, zot pou tonbe kouma fey sek; me bann fidel pou prospere kouma enn pie ki so feyaz touzour ver.
11.29: Seki fer so fami soufer, li pou gob ler. Bann ti-lespri touletan pou esklav bann saz.
11.30: Enn bon dimoun, li kouma enn pie ki donn lavi; me laviolans, souvan amenn lamor.
11.31: Si bon dimoun gagn rekonpans lor later, bann malfeter ek bann peser osi pou rekolte seki zot seme.

12.1: Bann dimoun ki anvi aprann, zot aksepte disiplinn; me bann bet pa aksepte repros.
12.2: LESEGNER donn so faver bann bon dimoun; me li kondann bann ki tir plan pou fer lemal.
12.3: Pratik lemal pa garanti sekirite; me dimoun drwat ena stabilite.
12.4: Enn bon fam, li kouma enn kouronn lor latet so mari; enn fam infidel, li kouma enn kanser dan lezo so mari.
12.5: Dimoun onet ena touzour bon lintansion; konsey enn malfeter met dimoun dan perdision.
12.6: Parol bann move dimoun kouma bann piez mortel; me parol dimoun drwat amenn delivrans.
12.7: Move dimoun fini mal, li pa les okenn tras; me fami dimoun drwat res bien solid.
12.8: Enn dimoun intelizan gagn ladmirasion; dimoun leker sal zame pou ena rezon.
12.9: Preferab res sinp e travay pou roul lakouzinn; olie met dan zar, me vant pe kriy lafaminn.
12.10: Bon dimoun okip bien zot zanimo; me move dimoun maltret seki pou zot.
12.11: Enn planter ki travay dir, so grenie ranpli; enn inbesil perdi letan ar tou seki initil.
12.12: Move dimoun rod rises mal-gagne; me bon dimoun zame mank manze.
12.13: Move dimoun pieze ar zot prop mansonz; dimoun onet konn evit maler.
12.14: Kan travay bien, gagn bon lapey; kan koz bon parol, gagn sikse.
12.15: Dimoun vantar touletan krwar zot ena rezon; me dimoun saz touletan ekout bon konsey.
12.16: Bann inbesil ankoler vit; me bann saz kontrol zot lemosion.
12.17: Enn temwin ki koz laverite amenn lazistis; mansonz enn move temwin nouri linzistis.
12.18: Parol anler fer dimal kouma lepe; me parol reflesi amenn gerizon ek lape.
12.19: Enn parol laverite res pou touzour; me enn parol mansonz res zis pou enn zour.
12.20: Ena mesanste dan leker bann dimoun ki fer lemal; me ena lazwa dan leker bann dimoun ki fer lape.
12.21: Bann dimoun ki drwat viv dan leboner; me bann malfeter antoure ar maler.
12.22: LESEGNER deteste dimoun manter; me li apresie dimoun sinser.
12.23: Dimoun edike pa fer palab; me bann bet etal zot betiz lor latab.
12.24: Dimoun ki travay dir pou gagn pouvwar; me bann pares pou vinn esklav.
12.25: Traka dan leker fer twa dekouraze; me enn bon parol fer twa soulaze.
12.26: Enn dimoun drwat donn bon konsey so prosin; me sime enn move dimoun amenn li dan petrin.
12.27: Bann dimoun pares pena nanye pou roti; me dimoun ki travay dir, touletan ena kitsoz pou kwi.
12.28: Lor sime ladrwatir, to pou viv lontan; me lor sime lemal, to pou mor kouma perdan.

13.1: Enn zanfan saz ekout konsey so papa; me enn vantar refiz rekonet so erer.
13.2: Bon dimoun rekolte fri so bon parol; bann malonet touletan swaf laviolans.
13.3: Fer bien atansion ar seki to dir e to pou prezerv to lavi; seki koz ninport san reflesi, pou zwenn tase.
13.4: Enn dimoun ki pares, so dezir zame abouti. Fer zefor! Travay dir, e tou to dezir pou realize.
13.5: Dimoun onet deteste mansonz; move dimoun fer lezot onte ar zot bann insilt.
13.6: Lonette, li enn proteksion pou bann dimoun drwat; pese bann malfeter amenn zot larwinn.
13.7: Ena ki pena nanye, me zot met dan zar, deklar risar; Ena ki ena fortinn, me zot fer krwar ki zot vant pe kriy faminn.
13.8: Bann ris servi kas pou protez zot lavi; me lavi bann pov zame pa menase.
13.9: Enn dimoun drwat, li kouma enn lalimier ki briye for-for; me enn malfeter, li kouma enn lalanp ki pe tengn.
13.10: Bann arogan nek provok dispit; me bann ki ekout konsey ena lasazes.
13.11: Larises mal-gagne pa pran letan pou evapore; me dibien ki ou ramase kouma gout lapli, pou fini par vinn enn rezervwar ki deborde.
13.12: Kan lespwar tom dan dilo, leker fermal; me kan enn rev realize, leker zwaye.
13.13: Si kikenn rezet enn bon konsey, li ava pey konsekans; me seki respekte komannman Bondie, li ava gagn rekonpans.
13.14: Lansegnman enn saz, li enn lafontenn ki donn lavi; li ed twa evit bann piez lamor.
13.15: Bon rezonnman fer twa gagn respe lezot; bann foser swiv sime perdision.
13.16: Dimoun rezonab reflesi avan azir; enn vantar fer letalaz so lignorans.
13.17: Mesaze foser amenn maler; mesaze fidel amenn bon nouvel.
13.18: Si to refiz aprann, to pou res pov e lezot pou mepriz twa; me si to aksepte koreksion enn profeser, to pou gagn loner.
13.19: Kan enn dimoun realiz so dezir, sa fer li plezir; me enn grannwar prefer res dan nwar.
13.20: Frekant dimoun saz e to pou vinn saz; me si to mars ar dimoun bet, to pou gagn problem.
13.21: Maler pourswiv bann peser; prosperite rekonpans bann fidel.
13.22: Bon dimoun kit leritaz pou tizanfan; larises bann move dimoun fini dan pos bon dimoun.
13.23: Karo abandone kapav donn malere boukou manze; me bann inzis prefer les terin anfris.
13.24: Paran ki pa koriz so zanfan pa kontan li; paran ki kontan so zanfan pa ezite pou koriz li e met li dan bon sime.
13.25: Bon dimoun manze, vant rasazie; move dimoun plengne, vant grogne.

14.1: Enn fam ki saz pran swin so fami; me enn fam bet detrir li ar so prop lame.
14.2: Dimoun ki viv enn lavi onet, respekte LESEGNER ; me seki malonet mepriz li.
14.3: Bann parol enn orgeye kouma enn baton pou bat limem; bann parol ki enn saz protez so lavi.
14.4: Si to pena toro pou labour later, to gardmanze res vid; lafors enn bef fer twa gagn bon rekolt.
14.5: Vre temwin koz laverite; fos temwin nek konn rakont mansonz.
14.6: Bann dimoun vantar zame pou vinn saz; me bann ki intelizan e reflesi, zot aprann vit.
14.7: Pa frekant bann inbesil; dan zot parol pena nanye ki bon.
14.8: Enn dimoun pridan ena lasazes, e li swazir bon sime; me lafoli enn vantar amenn li dan perdision.
14.9: Bann vantar pena laont kan zot fer pese; me bann dimoun drwat rod pardon Bondie.
14.10: Kan to leker dan lapenn, personn pa kone; kan to leker dan lazwa, personn pa kas latet.
14.11: Lakaz move dimoun fasil kraze; me lakaz bon dimoun prospere.
14.12: Fer atansion! Ena sime kapav paret bon, me alafin, to kapav trouv lamor.
14.13: Riye kapav kasiet tristes; kan lazwa vir ledo, lasagrin asize.
14.14: Move dimoun azir mal e zot pey konsekans; bon dimoun fer bon aksion e zot gagn rekonpans.
14.15: Dimoun bet, fasilman rant dan piez; dimoun pridan get bien kot li met so lipie.
14.16: Dimoun saz pran prekosion pou evit problem; ti-lespri tro prese, li bes latet, li rant dan piez.
14.17: Bann ki ankoler vit fer boukou betiz; kan ou anbet dimoun, zot deteste ou.
14.18: Bann bet erit zot betiz; bann intelizan erit konesans kouma enn kouronn.
14.19: Move dimoun pou kourbe divan bon dimoun; bann malfeter pou dimann sarite divan laport bann dimoun drwat.
14.20: Kan to mizer, dimoun vir ledo ar twa, mem to fami pa frekant twa. Me kan to ris, boukou dimoun fer kamarad ar twa!
14.21: Kan to mepriz to prosin ki gagn fin, to fer enn pese; bienere bann ki bon anver bann pov.
14.22: Dimoun ki ena move lintansion swiv sime perdision; dimoun ki ena bon santiman rekolte labonte ek fidelite.
14.23: Travay dir, e to pou gagn bien to lavi; pas to letan palabre, e to pou res dan dife.
14.24: Dimoun saz gagn larises kouma rekonpans; dimoun vantar rekolte divan.
14.25: Enn temwin sov lavi kan li koz laverite; me li enn tret kan li dir mansonz.
14.26: Kan nou respekte LESEGNER , nou sir nou pwin, e nou fami viv dan sekirite.
14.27: Respe pou LESEGNER, li enn lasours lavi; li ed twa evit bann piez mortel.
14.28: Enn gran popilasion fer laglwar enn lerwa; enn lerwa san enn pep pa vo nanye.
14.29: Si to gard to kalm, savedir to saz; si to sap lor kal vit, savedir to bet.
14.30: Kan to lespri trankil, to lekor bien; me kan to zalou, maladi ronz twa andan.
14.31: Kan fer dominer ar dimoun pov, nou insilte zot kreater; me kan pran swin bann pov, nou onor li.
14.32: Move dimoun pou kraze ar zot prop pese; bon dimoun ena lasirans, mem divan lamor.
14.33: Lasazes res dan leker enn dimoun intelizan; me li pa prezan dan leker enn vantar.
14.34: Lazistis fer laglwar enn pei; linzistis fer laont enn nasion.
14.35: Enn serviter intelizan gagn faver lerwa; me enn serviter malonet atir so koler.

15.1: Enn repons dou tengn lakoler; enn koze brit anflam laraz.
15.2: Parol enn saz fer gagn konesans; kan bann bet ouver labous, zis betiz ki sorti.
15.3: Lizie LESEGNER trouv partou; li obzerv seki bon ek seki move.
15.4: Bann zoli parol amenn lavi; koze gra fer leker fermal.
15.5: Enn inbesil pa pran kont konsey so paran; zanfan saz aksepte kan so paran met li dan bon sime.
15.6: Kan nou viv dan drwatir nou rises ogmante; kan nou viv dan pese, maler pou rwinn nou dibien.
15.7: Labous bann dimoun saz repann konesans; me bann dimoun bet ena lespri kokom.
15.8: Lapriyer bon dimoun fer LESEGNER plezir; me li deteste lofrand bann malonet.
15.9: LESEGNER deteste konportman bann move dimoun; me li kontan bann ki azir bien.
15.10: Si to swiv enn move sime, to pinision pou sever; si to deteste repros, to pou zwenn lamor.
15.11: LESEGNER okouran tou seki pase dan lemond bann mor; eski li pa pou kone ki pase dan nou leker?
15.12: Bann insolan pa kontan kan kritik zot; zame zot pa pou dimann konsey enn saz.
15.13: Kan ena lazwa dan leker, pou ena sourir lor lalev; me kan leker fermal, lespri abat.
15.14: Dimoun saz gagn swaf konesans; dimoun bet manz zis so foli.
15.15: Lavi enn pov li pa fasil me kan ena lazwa dan leker, lavi kouma enn fet.
15.16: Preferab gagn tigit, me ena respe pou LESEGNER ; ki gagn boukou avek enn ta traka.
15.17: Prefer manz enn ti repa sinp kot lamour regne; ki enn gran festin ar bann ipokrit.
15.18: Kan dimoun sof vit, dispit pran pouvwar; kan dimoun res kalm, lape gagn viktwar.
15.19: Sime bann pares ranpli ar pikan; me lor sime bann ki onet pena obstak.
15.20: Zanfan saz fer zot paran kontan; move zanfan fer zot paran plore.
15.21: Dimoun bet gagn plezir dan lafoli; dimoun rezonab mars dan enn sime drwat.
15.22: San bon konsey, to proze kapote; boukou bon konseye fer to proze avanse.
15.23: Ala nou kontan kan nou reysi donn enn bon repons; sa fer plezir kan nou koz enn bon parol zis kan bizin.
15.24: Dimoun saz pran sime ki donn lavi, pa sime ki donn lamor.
15.25: LESEGNER detrir lakaz bann orgeye, me li protez propriete bann vev.
15.26: LESEGNER deteste bann move lintansion; me li kontan bann parol amikal.
15.27: Si to galoup deryer larzan mal-gagne, to amenn problem lor to fami; si to pa pran gous, to pou viv lontan.
15.28: Bon dimoun reflesi avan reponn; me labous move dimoun koz zis parol lemal.
15.29: LESEGNER res lwin ar bann move dimoun; me li ekzos lapriyer bann bon dimoun.
15.30: Enn regar amikal fer leker kontan; enn bon nouvel fer nou repran kouraz.
15.31: Dimoun ki ekout bon konsey dan lavi, li ena so plas parmi bann saz.
15.32: Si to ignor bon konsey, to fer tomem ditor; me si to aksepte zot to vinn pli saz.
15.33: Respe pou LESEGNER fer gagn lasazes; limilite ouver laport loner.

16.1: Zom kapav fer bel-bel plan, me LESEGNER ki ena dernie mo.
16.2: Bann imin krwar ki zot pe bien azir; me LESEGNER konn bien ki ena dan zot leker.
16.3: Konfie LESEGNER to travay, li pou realiz tou to proze.
16.4: LESEGNER finn kre tou kiksoz pou enn rezon; mem bann malfeter finn kre pou zot konn zizman.
16.5: LESEGNER deteste larogans; bann arogan pou gagn zot pinision.
16.6: Dimoun ki lwayal ek fidel, so bann pese pardone; me si to respekte LESEGNER , to pou evit fer lemal.
16.7: Si to manier viv fer LESEGNER plezir, li fer to lennmi vinn to kamarad.
16.8: Preferab to gagn enn ti-kas dan lonette, ki gagn boukou kas dan fason malonet.
16.9: Bann imin fer bann plan dan zot leker; me LESEGNER ki deside seki pou arive.
16.10: Si parol enn lerwa inspire par Bondie, so zizman pou touletan korek.
16.11: Balans onet ek mezir zis, zot pou LESEGNER; li finn donn sak pwa so valer.
16.12: Lerwa deteste kan dimoun fer lemal; lazistis fer enn rwayom vinn pli for.
16.13: Lerwa apresie bann koze onet; li kontan dimoun ki koz laverite.
16.14: Enn dimoun saz fer tou pou lerwa res kalm; kan lerwa sap lor kal, lamor lor baz.
16.15: Kan lerwa dan lazwa, lavi briye dan pei; so bonte manifeste, kouma lapli ki rafresi.
16.16: Rod lasazes plito ki lor; swazir bon rezonnman plito ki larzan.
16.17: Lespri eklere evit pran sime lemal; kan to vey to manier viv, to prezerv to lavi.
16.18: Lorgey amenn destriksion; larogans amenn larwinn.
16.19: Preferab enn lavi sinp parmi bann pov, ki pran par dan rises mal-gagne bann orgeye.
16.20: Pran bien kont seki finn montre twa, to pou konn sixe; fer LESEGNER konfians, to pou ere.
16.21: Dimoun ki ena lespri lasazes ena disernman; pli li koz bon parol, pli lezot ekout li.
16.22: Dimoun ki ena lasazes, li ena enn lasours lavi. Bann bet pou tonbe ar zot prop betiz.
16.23: Enn dimoun saz reflesi avan li koze; so bann bon parol pou konvink lezot.
16.24: Bann bon parol parey kouma dimiel; li adousi lespri e li nouri lekor.
16.25: Fer atansion! Ena sime ki paret bon, me dan so bout, to kapav zwenn lamor.
16.26: Kan enn travayer gagn fin, li bizin travay; si li pa travay, so vant res vid.
16.27: Move dimoun rod tou mwayin pou fer ditor; zot parol kouma enn dife ki devor tou.
16.28: Move lespri fann rimer pou lev lager; palabrer met dibri ant bon kamarad.
16.29: Dimoun violan anbet so prosin; li kondir zot dan sime malsin.
16.30: Atansion! Dimoun ki pez lizie konplot mesanste; seki pez lalev manigans lemal.
16.31: Enn long lavi, li enn rekonpans, enn kouronn laglwar; sa, zis bann dimoun ki azir bien ki resevwar.
16.32: Preferab ena pasians ki pouvwar. Vomie to kontrol tomem ki to sey kontrol enn lavil.
16.33: Ena get oroskop pou konn lavenir; me zis LESEGNER ki desid tou.

17.1: Li meyer manz enn bout dipin sek dan trankilite, ki enn festin dan enn lakaz ranpli ar dispit.
17.2: Enn serviter intelizan ena plis merit ki enn eritie ki ena lespri volaz; sa serviter la pou gagn enn par dan leritaz.
17.3: Nou servi dife pou teste lor ek larzan; zis LESEGNER ki kapav teste nou leker.
17.4: Enn malfeter ekout koze malang; enn manter ekout koze mansonz.
17.5: Si to mepriz bann pov, pa bliye, to pe mepriz zot kreater osi; ena pinision pou seki pran plezir dan soufrans lezot.
17.6: Bann ti-zanfan fer fierte bann granparan; bann paran fer loner zot zanfan.
17.7: Li paret drol kan enn bet koz bon koze; me li ankor pli drol kan enn dirizan koz ninport.
17.8: Ena panse kan zot donn gous koumadir zot pe fer mazik; zot krwar li enn lakle paspartou.
17.9: Si to anvi dimoun kontan twa, pardonn zot erer; si touletan to repros zot erer, to kapav dir bay-bay lamitie.
17.10: Enn ti repros ena plis lefe lor enn dimoun saz, ki san kout baton lor ledo enn bet.
17.11: Move dimoun konn zis fer ninport. Tansion! Mesaze lamor pou vinn tap so laport.
17.12: Li preferab zwenn enn mama lours ki finn perdi so piti, ki afront enn bet ki finn plonze dan so foli.
17.13: Si to rann lemal pou lebien, lemal zame pou kit to lakaz.
17.14: Komansman enn dispit li kouma enn felir dan rezervwar; aret li vit, sinon inondasion.
17.15: LESEGNER pa kontan kan fer inosan pey pou koupab, e kan fer malfeter pas pou sin.
17.16: Ki serti met larzan dan lame enn vantar? Pou li aste lasazes? Non, bonsans mem li pena.
17.17: Enn vre kamarad res fidel dan tou sirkonstans; nou fami la pou partaz nou soufrans.
17.18: Fode latet pa bon pou dibout garan, e pou pey det ou prosin.
17.19: Si to kontan sem diskord, to lavi pou dan dezord; si to orgeye, to pou zwenn tase.
17.20: Enn triser pa pou gagn valer; enn manter pou tom dan maler.
17.21: Paran ki gagn enn zanfan bet, li dan lapenn; zanfan bet met paran dan tourman.
17.22: Si lazwa dan leker, lasante pou meyer; kan traka dan lespri, lekor deperi.
17.23: Kan ziz pran gous, lalwa vinn lous.
17.24: Enn dimoun intelizan gard so regar lor lasazes; enn dimoun bet gard so latet dan niaz.
17.25: Zanfan bet met so papa dan lapenn; li rann lavi so mama amer.
17.26: Li pa bon kan fer inosan pey lamann; li inzis kan met dimoun integ dan prizon.
17.27: Dimoun ki pa koz boukou ena konesans; dimoun ki gard so kalm ena lasirans.
17.28: Mem enn bet ki gard silans pas pou enn saz; kan li ferm labous, li pas pou enn gran malin.

18.1: Dimoun egois rod so prop lintere; li ankoler kan donn li bon konsey.
18.2: Dimoun bet pa sey konpran; li rod montre ki li enn gran tenor.
18.3: Pese amenn laont; kan loner tonbe, mepri pran plas.
18.4: Ena dimoun, zot parol profon kouma losean; zot sazes kler kouma dilo lasours.
18.5: Li pa korek protez koupab; li inakseptab met inosan dan prizon.
18.6: Parol enn bagarer atir dispit, seki rod lager gagn rakle.
18.7: Kan enn vantar koze, li rwinn limem; so parol kouma enn piez pou may limem.
18.8: Ayo palab! To kouma enn gato fondan; to fondan dan pale, to glise, to desann.
18.9: Enn dimoun ki pares, li frer avek destrikter.
18.10: LESEGNER , li kouma enn latour bien solid; kot li, bon dimoun gagn lape ek sekirite.
18.11: Ena dimoun ris ki krwar zot lamone kapav protez zot, zot panse zot rises kouma enn miray fortifie.
18.12: Leker ki ranpli ar lorgey atir katastrof; me limilite atir loner.
18.13: Ekoute avan reponn, sinon to pou pas pou enn bet e to pou onte.
18.14: Kan to moral for, to konbat maladi; me si to moral ba, kouma to pou manz ar li?
18.15: Enn dimoun intelizan touletan anvi aprann; enn saz touletan anvi ekout bon lansegnman.
18.16: Si to anvi zwenn enn dimoun inportan, amenn enn kado valab e laport pou ouver.
18.17: Premie dimoun ki koze divan ziz, paret pe koz vre; me tou sanze kan so adverser koumans kestionn li.
18.18: Kouma pou aret enn dispit ant de dimoun ris dan lakour? Meyer tir lakourtpay pou departaz zot.
18.19: Pa ofans enn frer, li pou bien difisil pou to afront li apre. Dispit ferm leker, kouma verou enn laport an-fer.
18.20: Bon parol enn dimoun ranpli so vant; so zoli diskour rasazie li.
18.21: Lalang ena pouvwar, li kapav amenn lavi ouswa lamor; si to kontan koze, fer tansion konsekans.
18.22: Kan enn zom marye avek enn fam, li trouv so boner; li enn benediksion LESEGNER .
18.23: Bann pov sipliye pou gagn faver; bann ris reponn ar koler.
18.24: Parfwa kamarad vinn kamaron; me enn kamarad sinser, li kapav pli serye ki frer-ser.

19.1: Preferab pov, me onet; ki manter e bet.
19.2: Kan pa pran letan reflesi avan azir, li danzere; kan tro prese, kapav zwenn kogne.
19.3: Ena ki detrir zot lavi ar zot prop erer; apre sa, zot ankoler kont LESEGNER .
19.4: Dimoun ris, touletan gagn boukou nouvo kamarad; dimoun pov perdi so sel kamarad.
19.5: Enn zour, fos temwin pou konn kondanasion; manter pou gagn so pinision.
19.6: Setaki oule gagn faver enn dimoun bon leker; tou dimoun kamarad ar kikenn ki zenere.
19.7: Si dimoun mizer gagn rezete par so prop frer, zize aster kouma so bann kamarad pou fer ar li! Li fer tou pou koz ar zot, me so parol tom dan dilo.
19.8: Aprann gagn lasazes e to pou viv ere; viv ek disernman e to pou prospere.
19.9: Enn zour, fos temwin pou gagn seki li merite; bann manter napa pou sape.
19.10: Li drol kan enn dimoun bet viv dan lix; me li pli drol kan enn serviter diriz so sef.
19.11: Dimoun rezonab kontrol so koler; kan li pardonn lezot, li gagn plis loner.
19.12: Kan lerwa ankoler tou dimoun gagn per; me so bonte kouma laroze ki rafresi lerb ver.
19.13: Zanfan malelve met papa dan traka; enn fam ki pa aret dispite, li kouma enn tiyo ki perse.
19.14: Enn dimoun kapav erit lakaz ek larzan ar so paran; me enn fam intelizan, li enn benediksion LESEGNER .
19.15: Si to pares, si to kontan dormi, pa rod manze kan vant grogne.
19.16: Obzerv komannman Bondie e to pou viv bien; me si to rezet so parol to pou trouv lamor.
19.17: Kan to ed bann pov, to pe pret LESEGNER , limem ki pou rekonpans twa.
19.18: Koriz to zanfan kan ankor ena letan; me dan to koler, zame pa swet so maler.
19.19: Enn dimoun violan bizin pey konsekans; sinon, sak fwa li pou refer so violans.
19.20: Si to ekout bann konsey, si to dispoze pou aprann to leson, dousma-dousma to pou vinn saz.
19.21: Dimoun kapav fer boukou proze; me volonte LESEGNER ki pou realize.
19.22: Nou apresie dimoun bon ek sinser; mil fwa to pov ki to manter.
19.23: Respekte LESEGNER e to pou viv bien; to pou viv an-sekirite e maler pa pou koste ar twa.
19.24: Dimoun pares met lame dan lasiet manze, me li tro feb pou met manze-la dan so labous.
19.25: Koriz enn insolan, bann bet pou aprann vinn pridan; montre enn bon dimoun so erer, li pou vinn pli intelizan.
19.26: Zanfan ki bat so papa e rezet so mama, li atir laont ek dezoner.
19.27: Mo zanfan, pa aret aprann; sinon, to pou bliye seki to deza kone.
19.28: Pena lazistis kan fos temwin koz manti pou koulout bon dimoun. Move dimoun nek medit lemal.
19.29: Bann insolan pou gagn kondanasion; bann bet pou gagn pinision.

20.1: Divin fer twa vinn tapazer, lalkol fer twa rod lager; dimoun ki dan soulezon zame vinn saz.
20.2: Kan lerwa ankoler li kouma enn lion ki pe grogne; pa ogmant so koler, to pou fini sis pie anba later.
20.3: Ninport ki fezer kapav lev lager; me li enn loner pou dimoun ki konn evit lager.
20.4: Fermie pares pa prepar karo dan bon sezon; ler rekolt vini, zero plonbaz.
20.5: Panse dan leker enn dimoun, li profon kouma dilo kler anba later; bizin enn lespri fite pou fer li monte.
20.6: Tou dimoun lor later dir ki zot sinser; anverite, pena boukou ki to kapav vremem fer konfians.
20.7: Bienere bann zanfan, si zot paran amenn enn lavi san repros.
20.8: Enn vre dirizan, li enn bon ziz; li konn detekte seki move.
20.9: Personn pa kapav dir ki so konsians kler; personn pa kapav pretann ki li pena pese.
20.10: Kan pwa ek mizir trike, LESEGNER deteste.
20.11: Mem enn zanfan montre ki li ete par so konportman; fasil pou kone si li bon, si li onet.
20.12: LESEGNER finn donn nou lizie pou gete, ek zorey pou ekoute.
20.13: Si to pas letan dormi to pou lor lapay, me to katora # 20:13 Gardmanze. pou plin si to leve, to al travay.
20.14: Kan pri tro ser, kliyan plengne; kan li aste mwin ser, li blage e li dir ki li konn marsande.
20.15: Bann parol konesans pli presie ki boukou lor ek pierpresie.
20.16: Si kikenn ase bet pou garanti det enn etranze, li merite kan ipotek so dibien kouma garanti.
20.17: Manze kokin, li bien dou dan labous, me bien vit li vinn ros anba ledan.
20.18: Swiv bon konsey si to anvi to proze reisi; reflesi bien avan to azir.
20.19: Palabrer pa konn gard sekre. Pa frekant dimoun ki nek blage.
20.20: Si to modi to paran, to lavi pou tengn avan ler, kouma enn lalanp dan lanwit.
20.21: Lamone fasil, mal gagne; li pa pou profit twa plitar.
20.22: Pa pran lalwa dan to lame; met dan lame LESEGNER , limem Ziz.
20.23: LESEGNER pa kontan kan trik balans; li malonet kan fos mizir.
20.24: LESEGNER , limem ki diriz nou pa; akoz sa, souvan nou pa konpran kot nou pe ale.
20.25: Pans bien avan to promet LESEGNER enn lofrand. Pa fer enn serman ki to pou regrete! Li bien danzere!
20.26: Enn bon dirizan kone kisannla ki move; li pou pini zot san pitie.
20.27: LESEGNER finn donn nou enn konsians kouma enn lalanp; li explor nou leker.
20.28: Enn lerwa res opouvwar kan li bon ek onet; so fidelite rann so tronn pli solid.
20.29: Fierte zenes dan zot lafors; me seve blan fer bote gran-dimoun.
20.30: Parfwa bizin gagn bate pou nou manier sanze; souvan bizin gagn dimal pou leker transforme.

21.1: Lespri enn dirizan kouma enn larivier dan lame LESEGNER ; li diriz li kot li anvi.
21.2: To kapav panse ki to ena rezon; me LESEGNER konn bien to lintansion.
21.3: LESEGNER prefer ladrwatir ek lazistis ki enn lofrand.
21.4: Move dimoun ena regar meprizan ek leker arogan; samem ki met zot pese okler.
21.5: Prepar to proze avek swin e to pou gagn sikse; me si to rod al tro vit, to pou zwenn tase.
21.6: Larises ki to gagne kan to koz manti, li atir twa dan lamor e li disparet vit.
21.7: Move dimoun kondane par zot prop violans. Kifer zot refiz sanze?
21.8: Bann malonet mars lor sime traver; dimoun zis swazir sime bien drwat.
21.9: Prefer dormi deor, dan kwin lakaz; ki dan lakaz, ar enn dimoun gran labous.
21.10: Move dimoun pans zis fer lemal; zot pena pitie pou personn.
21.11: Kan vantar gagn pinision, mem ignoran gagn enn leson; me linstriksion grandi konesans enn saz.
21.12: Bondie li zis! Li konn tou seki pase dan lakaz move dimoun; li pou donn zot pinision ki zot merite.
21.13: Si to refiz ekoute kan bann pov kriye, tou zorey pou sourd, ler twa to rod sekour.
21.14: Si to anvi kalme koler kikenn, donn li enn kado an-sekre; si to anvi tengn so laraz, glis enn ti prezan dan so pos.
21.15: Kan lazistis triyonfe, bon dimoun kontan; me bann malfeter gagn per.
21.16: Dimoun ki pa swiv bon sime konesans, bien vit pou rant dan bis lamor.
21.17: Dimoun ki kontan lamizman pou res pov; dimoun ki kontan labwason zame pou vinn ris.
21.18: Kan bann move dimoun rod piez bann bon dimoun, zot invit katastrof lor zotmem.
21.19: Preferab viv dan dezer, ki viv ar enn partner move karakter.
21.20: Dan lakaz enn saz ena bann gran rises; bann dimoun bet gaspiy pou zot sanses.
21.21: Rod touzour labonte ek lazistis e to pou viv lontan; dimoun pou respekte twa e pou onor twa.
21.22: Enn zeneral saz, pou reisi pran enn lavil bien proteze; li pou arive kraz miray sitadel.
21.23: Vey bien to langaz, e problem pa pou vinn dan to lakaz.
21.24: Dimoun ki fier ek vantar, zot insolan; zot azir ek boukou larogans.
21.25: Dimoun pares mor avan zot realiz so dezir; an-efe, so lame lour pou travay later.
21.26: Bann pares pas letan anvi kitsoz lezot; me bon dimoun donn zot kitsoz ek leker kontan.
21.27: Lofrand enn malfeter bien degoutan; sirtou kan li ofer li avek enn move lintansion.
21.28: Bann fos temwin pou disparet; me dimoun ki konn ekoute, li pou kapav temwagne avek sikse.
21.29: Move dimoun fer sanblan zot serye; bon dimoun viv enn lavi exanpler.
21.30: Mem si to ena bann verti kouma lasazes, bon rezonnman, ek disernman, to pa pou kapav defie LESEGNER .
21.31: Nou kapav prepar bann seval pou konba; me zis LESEGNER ki donn laviktwar.

22.1: Enn bon repitasion meyer ki enn gran rises; loner vo plis ki lor ek larzan.
22.2: Ris ek pov ena enn kitsoz an-komin: LESEGNER finn kre toulede.
22.3: Dimoun rezonab trouv problem vini e li pran prekosion; bann ki pa reflesi fons drwat, e zot pey konsekans.
22.4: Mars avek limilite e respekte LESEGNER ; lerla, to pou viv lontan e to pou gagn rises ek loner.
22.5: Ena pikan ek piez lor sime move dimoun; dimoun pridan res lwin ar sa sime-la.
22.6: Montre enn zanfan bon manier viv depi li tipti; li pou met sa an-pratik mem kan li finn vinn vie.
22.7: Dimoun ris dominn lor dimoun pov; bann anprinter vinn esklav bann kaser.
22.8: Kan to sem linzistis, to rekolte maler; e to koler pou anvol dan ler.
22.9: Bann dimoun ki ena bon leker pou gagn benediksion, parski zot partaz zot manze ar bann pov.
22.10: Si to anvi aret enn dispit, met bann insolan deor; lerla, pa pou ena ni lager ni insilt.
22.11: Si to leker prop e si to koz avek bonte, lerwa, limem pou vinn to kamarad.
22.12: LESEGNER veye ki laverite triyonfe e li kas plan bann manter.
22.13: Bann pares res lakaz, zot dir: “Ena enn lion deor pou manz mwa.”
22.14: Bann parol enn adilter, zot kouma enn piez danzere; si to rant ladan, LESEGNER pou ankoler ar twa.
22.15: Li normal ki zanfan fer betiz. Me disiplinn zot! Lerla, zot pou sanze.
22.16: Si to rod vinn ris lor ledo bann pov, e si to donn kado bann ris, enn zour, twa ki pou vinn pov.
22.17: Ouver to zorey e ekout parol dimoun saz; met an-pratik mo bann lansegnman.
22.18: To pou ere, si to gard zot dan to leker, e lor to lalev.
22.19: Mo anvi to met to konfians dan LESEGNER , akoz sa, zordi, mo pe dir twa sa bann parol lasazes-la.
22.20: Pou twa mo finn ekrir trant konsey, bann parol konesans ek sazes.
22.21: Sa bann konsey-la pou fer twa kone ki bon e ki vre; to pou konn donn bon repons kouma enn bon mesaze.
22.22: Pa kokin enn pov zis parski li mizer; e pa kraz kikenn ki pena mwayin pou pran enn avoka.
22.23: An-efe, LESEGNER pou pled pou li e pou konfiske to lavi, kouma to finn konfiske dibien enn malere.
22.24: Pa rant kamarad ar dimoun ki sap lor kal brit-brit; pa frekant dimoun ki sofe pou enn wi, pou enn non;
22.25: parski to kapav vinn kouma li, e may dan enn latrap.
22.26: Pa fer erer donn parol pou garanti det lezot.
22.27: Tansion, si to pa kapav ranbourse, bann la pou vinn tir twa lor to lili e pou pran tou to dibien.
22.28: Pa kokin propriete to vwazin; pa deplas bann born ki to anset finn mete.
22.29: Get bien sa artizan ki fer so travay bien la; lerwa pou angaz li, e li pou nepli bizin travay pou etranze.

23.1: Si to invite pou manze kot enn dimoun inportan, to bizin ena enn bon konportman.
23.2: Si to lapeti feros, konn kontrol twa.
23.3: Pa les twa tante par so bann manze rar; sa kapav rann twa malad.
23.4: Aret touy lekor pou vinn ris; les lasazes gid twa. Lerla, to pou kone kan bizin dir non.
23.5: Apenn to get to larzan dan to lame, li rod sime ale; li met lezel, li mont dan lezer kouma zwazo.
23.6: Refiz al manze kot enn dimoun peng; pa dezir so bann manze rar;
23.7: parski li touletan fer kont. Ar so labous li pou dir twa: “manz ankor, bwar ankor!” Me dan so leker li pa sinser.
23.8: Apre sa, to pou vomi seki to finn manze; lerla, bann parol remersiman ki to finn dir li, pa pou servi nanye.
23.9: Pa gaspiy to bann parol sazes ar enn dimoun san-konpran; koumadir to pe zet dilo lor bredsonz.
23.10: Pa deplas bann vie born; Pa kokin later bann orfelin san defans;
23.11: LESEGNER , zot defanser, li pwisan. Li pou pled zot ka kont twa.
23.12: Grav lansegnman ki to finn gagne dan to leker; ouver to zorey pou ekout bann parol ki donn konesans.
23.13: Pa ezite pou koriz enn zanfan; enn tikout rotin pa pou touy li.
23.14: Okontrer, sa pou ed li e pou tir li dan sime lamor.
23.15: Mo zanfan, si to vinn saz, mo leker pou dan lazwa.
23.16: Mo pou bien fier, kan mo pou tann twa koz bann parol konesans.
23.17: Pa bizin zalou bann move dimoun; respekte LESEGNER sak zour to lavi.
23.18: Lerla, to pou ena enn bon lavenir, e to lespwar pa pou tom dan dilo.
23.19: Mo piti, ekout mwa e to pou vinn saz; diriz to pa lor sime ladrwatir.
23.20: Pa frekant soular; Pa frekant voras.
23.21: Soular ek voras pou fini lor lapay. Si to nek manze-bwar apre to dormi, biento to pou met kostim goni # 23:21 Kostim goni: Linz move kalite. .
23.22: Ekout to papa ki finn donn twa lavi; pa abandonn to mama kan li dan laz.
23.23: Touletan rod laverite, zame pa rezet li; kiltiv lasazes, linstriksion ek disernman.
23.24: Kan enn zanfan amenn enn bon lavi, so paran ranpli ar lazwa; leker enn paran kontan kan so zanfan saz.
23.25: Fer to paran kontan; donn lazwa to mama ki finn met twa lor later.
23.26: Mo zanfan, fer mwa konfians; swiv mo lexanp dan lazwa.
23.27: Enn prostitie, li kouma enn piez pou twa; enn fam adilter, li kouma enn latrap.
23.28: Li vey lokazion kouma enn voler. Li finn fini kas boukou menaz.
23.29: Kisann-la ki dan traka e pe regrete? Kisann-la nek sipote e dispite? Kisann-la nek gagn dimal pou nanye? Kisann-la so lizie touletan rouz?
23.30: Bann ki touletan dan tavern; bann ki nek bwar melanz.
23.31: Pa les twa tante ar larak; pa les li atir twa ar so kouler ek so lekim; dan labous li bon, li glise, li desann.
23.32: Me alafin to pou konn so refrin, ler li mord twa kouma serpan.
23.33: Maloker pou fer twa trouv zekler; to pou delire, to pou rabase.
23.34: To latet pou vire; to pou balans dekote kouma enn bato dan tanpet.
23.35: To pou dir: “Zot ti bat mwa, me mo pa rapel; mo finn gagn dimal, me mo pa santi. Kan pou gramatin? Mo bizin enn topet pou kas malad latet.”

24.1: Pa rod fer kouma bann move dimoun; pa ni frekant zot.
24.2: An-efe, dan zot panse ena zis violans; zis mesanste ki sorti dan zot labous.
24.3: Ar lasazes nou aranz enn lakaz; ar disernman nou fer li vinn pli solid.
24.4: Avek lexperyans nou ranpli bann lasam ar bann zoli obze valer.
24.5: Enn dimoun saz, li pli siperyer ki enn dimoun for; enn gran servo pli inportan ki zis lafors fizik.
24.6: Si to konn servi to lespri, sa pou ed twa kont to lennmi; kan to ena boukou bon konseye, laviktwar asire.
24.7: Lasazes tro difisil pou enn bet; kan dimoun saz zwenn ansam, bann bet pena nanye pou dir.
24.8: Si touletan to tir plan pou fer lemal, dimoun pou apel twa malfeter.
24.9: Enn malfeter, so program nek fer pese; personn pa kontan enn vantar arogan.
24.10: Si to bes lebra dan letan difisil, savedir to feb.
24.11: Pa ezite pou al sekour enn inosan ki finn kondane amor; sap lavi dimoun ki pe kabose pou al divan bouro.
24.12: Kapav to pou dir: “Mo pa ti kone.” Me, pa bliye, Bondie konn to leker. Li konn tou seki to fer; li pou rekonpans twa dapre to bann aksion.
24.13: Mo zanfan, dimiel bon pou manze; li dou dan labous.
24.14: Konpran mo zanfan, lasazes kouma dimiel pou to nam; kan to ena li, to lavenir asire, e to lespwar pa pou tom dan dilo.
24.15: Pa fer kouma bann malfeter ki vey lokazion pou atak fami bon dimoun; pa devaliz lakaz dimoun drwat.
24.16: Ninport komie fwa bon dimoun tonbe, li pou releve; me bann malfeter fini dan maler.
24.17: Pa bizin zibile kan to lennmi tonbe; pa sote-pile kan li kogne.
24.18: LESEGNER pa pou kontan kan li trouv sa; e li pa pou pini li.
24.19: Pa kas to latet ar bann move dimoun; pa rod vinn kouma zot;
24.20: parski move dimoun pena lavenir; zot lavi pou tengn vit, kouma lalanp san petrol.
24.21: Mo zanfan, respekte LESEGNER e respekte lerwa; pa rant kamarad ar lennmi LESEGNER , ni ar lennmi lerwa.
24.22: Parski toulede ena pouvwar pou rwinn twa. Personn pa kone ki maler zot kapav fer.
24.23: Ala proverb dimoun saz: Enn ziz pa gagn drwa get ar de lizie.
24.24: Si enn ziz dir enn koupab: “To inosan,” dimoun pou modi li, lepep pou deteste li.
24.25: Me si ziz-la pini bann koupab, li pou gagn loner ek boukou benediksion.
24.26: Enn repons onet, li enn prev lamitie.
24.27: Okip to lakour, prepar to terin avan; apre to kapav aranz to lakaz.
24.28: Pa akiz to vwazin san rezon; pa bizin koz manti.
24.29: Zame pa dir: “Mo pou tret li kouma li finn tret mwa; bate rande pa fer dimal.”
24.30: Mo ti pas kot karo enn pares; kot plantasion enn bet.
24.31: Move lerb ti pe nate partou; pie pikan ti pe fer lalwa; ek miray ti finn grene dan boukou landrwa.
24.32: Mo ti arete, gete, reflesi; leson la ti bien kler:
24.33: Kan kas poz fer somey, kan krwaz lebra repoze,
24.34: lamizer atak twa kouma enn voler, lafin ek laswaf tom lor twa kouma enn bandi.

25.1: Ala ankor plizir proverb Salomon, ki ti kopie par bann skrib Ezekias, lerwa Zida.
25.2: Nou glorifie LESEGNER parski so bann aksion res bann gran mister; nou glorifie lerwa parski li desifre bann mister la.
25.3: Parey kouma nou pa konn oter lesiel ouswa profonder lamer, zame nou pou konn profonder panse enn lerwa.
25.4: Tir verdigri ki kouver larzan, e bizoutie pou kapav fasonn bann obze presie.
25.5: Met tou froder deor dan lantouraz lerwa, lerla, li pou gouvern ar lazistis, e so pouvwar pou grandi.
25.6: Pa fer vantar dan prezans lerwa; pa sey pran plas seki pli gran ki twa.
25.7: Parski li boukou pli bon kan gagn promosion, ki kan perdi grad divan enn sef.
25.8: Kan to finn trouv kiksoz, pa prese pou met zafer lakour. Si to adverser prouve ki to ena tor, lerla, to latet pou bese ar laont.
25.9: Sey regle problem an-prive ar to vwazin; pa bizin devwal sekre personn.
25.10: Dimoun pou akiz twa pou difamasion, e sa pou touzour rwinn to repitasion.
25.11: Enn parol bien kalkile, li kouma enn desin an-or lor enn plato an-arzan.
25.12: Enn bon konsey, li kouma enn zano gran valer pou zorey ki ekoute.
25.13: Enn serviter fidel ek onet soulaz langwas so met, kouma dilo lasours, rafresi bann kouper kann anplin lete.
25.14: Dimoun ki touletan promet kado, me zame pa done, li kouma niaz ek divan ki zame donn lapli.
25.15: Avek pasians, to kapav fer to sef sanz lide; douser dan langaz fer baraz tonbe.
25.16: Si to finn dekouver dimiel, pa fer gourman; manz zis, pou ki to pa gagn maloker apre.
25.17: Pa tro met nene kot to vwazin, sinon, li pou plin ar twa e li pou koumans deteste twa.
25.18: Si to akiz to prosin pou nanye, koumadir to pe atak li ar baton, fles ek lepe.
25.19: Si to fer konfians enn dimoun malonet dan to maler, koumadir to pe manze ar enn ledan bouze, ouswa to pe marse ar enn lipie foule.
25.20: Pa sant bann sante lazwa ar enn dimoun ki dan tristes, li koumadir to pe tir to linz dan freser, ouswa to pe vid lalkol lor enn ple.
25.21: Si to lennmi gagn fin, donn li manze; si li swaf, donn li bwar.
25.22: Sa pou rann li malalez. So latet pou sofe, koumadir ena labrez. Lerla, LESEGNER pou rekonpans twa.
25.23: Divan lenor amenn lapli lete, palab amenn lakoler.
25.24: Prefer dormi deor dan kwin lakaz, ki dan lakaz avek enn partner gran labous.
25.25: Parey kouma dilo fre apez nou laswaf, enn bon nouvel fer nou leker kontan.
25.26: Kan enn bon dimoun kapitile divan enn malfeter, li parey kouma labou dan dilo, ouswa pwazon dan lasours.
25.27: Li pa bon manz tro boukou dimiel; li pa bon osi, kan to rod tro boukou loner.
25.28: Enn dimoun ki pa kontrol so koler, li kouma enn lavil san defans divan lennmi.

26.1: Eski lanez tonbe dan lete? Eski lapli tonbe dan sezon sek? Parey! Loner pa ale ar enn dimoun bet.
26.2: Kouma mwano vir-vire dan lesiel, kouma zirondel tourn-tourne dan lezer, malediksion san fondman pa poz lor personn.
26.3: Enn kravas pou seval, enn baton pou bourik, enn rotin pou ledo enn bet.
26.4: Pa kas latet reponn enn bet; sinon to pou abes twa net.
26.5: Si to reponn enn bet, fer li kone li bet; sinon, li pou pran li pou enn fwet.
26.6: Si to swazir enn bet pou pas to mesaz, koumadir to pe koup to prop lipie; to pe invit traka.
26.7: Enn parol saz dan labous enn bet, li feb kouma lipie enn paralize.
26.8: Si to felisit enn bet, li koumadir to pe met enn ros dan enn fles. Tansion blese!
26.9: Enn proverb dan labous enn bet, li kouma enn kouto dan lame soular.
26.10: Si enn patron anplway enn bet ouswa enn soular, koumadir li pe tir kout fles lor tou dimoun.
26.11: Enn bet ki repet mem betiz, wadir enn lisien ki remanz so vomi.
26.12: Mil fwa to zwenn enn bet, ki to zwenn enn dimoun ki deklar saz.
26.13: Enn pares dir: “Ena enn lion deor! Ena danze partou!”
26.14: Enn laport vire-tourne lor so gon; enn pares vire-tourne lor so lili.
26.15: Enn pares met lame dan lasiet manze, me li tro feb pou met manze-la dan so labous.
26.16: Enn pares krwar ki li pli malin ki bann dimoun ki ena disernman.
26.17: Si to met to nene dan bagar ki pa konsern twa, koumadir to pe trap zorey enn move lisien.
26.20: Kan nepli ena dibwa, dife tengn; kan nepli ena palab, dispit arete.
26.21: Parey kouma sarbon fer labrez ek dibwa nouri dife, enn palabrer nouri laenn ek konfli.
26.22: Parol palab, li kouma enn manze ki finn bien prepare; li fondan dan labous e li fasil pou dizere.
26.23: Lapintir kasiet defo lor dibwa, me zoli parol kasiet mesanste ki dan leker.
26.24: Enn ipokrit kasiet so laenn dan so bann parol dou; me dan so leker, li pe mont enn move kou.
26.25: Kan to lennmi flat twa ar zoli parol, pa krwar li; parski so leker ranpli ar lafoli.
26.26: Li kapav ase rize pou kasiet so laenn, me enn zour, so mesanste pou paret anplin lizour.
26.27: Si to fouy trou pou piez lezot, tomem ki pou tom ladan; si to koumans roul enn gro ros, li pou retourn lor tomem.
26.28: Lalang manter deteste so viktim; kikenn ki met dan siro rwinn dimoun ki li flate la.

27.1: Aret fer grannwar konsernan dime; parski personn pa kone ki kapav arive zordi.
27.2: Pa lev tomem anler, les enn lot flat twa; mem enn etranze kapav felisit twa, me pa fer li tomem.
27.3: Enn ros pez lour, disab osi; me provokasion enn bet pli lour ankor.
27.4: Laviolans fer per, lakoler danzere; me zalouzi pli terib ki toulede.
27.5: Enn kritik fran ek onet li meyer ki enn santiman ki res andan.
27.6: Mem si enn kamarad repros twa kitsoz, to kapav fer li konfians; me si enn lennmi vinn anbras twa, pran kont!
27.7: Kan to vant plin, dimiel osi to pou refize; me kan to afame, mem margoz to pou anvi manze.
27.8: Enn dimoun ki lwin ar lakaz so fami, li kouma enn zwazo ki lwin ar so nik.
27.9: Parfin ek delwil esansiel met lazwa dan leker; me nanye pa bat lamitie enn kamarad sinser.
27.10: Pa rezet to kamarad, ni kamarad to papa. Si to bizin led, pa al rode kot fami reste; enn vwazin akote, pli sir ki enn fami ki res lwin.
27.11: Mo zanfan, viv ar lasazes; to ava met mo leker dan lazwa. Lerla, mo pou ena repons pou dimoun ki kritik mwa.
27.12: Enn dimoun intelizan, li konn evit maler; enn ignoran, nek bes latet fonse. Lerla, li zwenn tase.
27.13: Si kikenn ase bet pou garanti det enn etranze, li merite kan pran so prop dibien pou ranbours det-la.
27.14: Si gramatin boner to lev to vwazin pou dir li bonzour for-for, koumadir to pe insilte li.
27.15: Enn partner ki manz lavi touletan, li kouma lapli ki pa aret tonbe;
27.16: si to sey aret li, koumadir to pe sey aret divan ki soufle, ouswa to pe rod trap delwil dan to lame.
27.17: Feray fit feray; dimoun transform dimoun.
27.18: Si to okip to pie fri, to pou manz so fri; si to okip lintere to patron, to pou gagn loner.
27.19: Get dan laglas, to pou trouv to figir; get dan to leker, to pou trouv to karakter.
27.20: Lamor zame satisfe, pli li gagne li pran. Bann imin osi parey, zame zot satisfe ar seki zot ena.
27.21: Nou konn kalite lor ek larzan atraver dife; nou konn valer enn dimoun atraver so repitasion.
27.22: Ninport ki kantite bate to pou bat enn bet, li pa pou aret fer betiz.
27.23: Get bien lasante to zanimo; pran bien kont to troupo.
27.24: Parski larises, pa dir lontan, kouma regn enn lerwa pa dir touletan.
27.25: Kan to finn fini koup lerb, li repouse; kan to al ramas lerb lor flan kolinn pou nouri to zanimo,
27.26: to bann mouton pou abiy twa, to bann troupo pou permet twa aste later.
27.27: Pou ena ase dile pou nouri twa ek to fami; anplis, to pou kapav nouri to bann serviter ek servant.

28.1: Bann move dimoun sove mem kan pena danze; me bann bon dimoun res brav kouma enn lion.
28.2: Kan enn pei revolte, boukou sef rod pran pouvwar; me kan enn dirizan intelizan ek saz, so pouvwar res solid.
28.3: Kan enn diktater leve ek fer dominer ar bann pov, li kouma gro lapli ki detrir tou rekolt.
28.4: Bann ki rezet lalwa, donn rezon bann malfeter; bann ki respekte lalwa, konbat bann malfeter.
28.5: Move dimoun pa konpran nanye lor lazistis; me bann ki respekte LESEGNER konpran tou.
28.6: Preferab pov, me onet ki ris, me malonet.
28.7: Bann zenes ki ena disernman, zot obzerv lalwa; me seki ena move frekantasion fer so paran onte.
28.8: Bann kaser ki vinn ris lor ledo lezot, pa pou kapav profit zot larzan; enn zour, dimoun ki ed bann pov ki pou erit zot rises.
28.9: Si kikenn pa ouver so zorey pou ekout lalwa, Bondie osi pa pou ekout so lapriyer.
28.10: Tou seki antrenn bon dimoun dan sime lemal, pou tom dan zot prop piez. Me bann dimoun onet pou konn enn lavenir ere.
28.11: Dimoun ris fer sanblan zot saz; me enn pov ki ena disernman, kapav demaske zot.
28.12: Kan bon dimoun gagn laviktwar, lepep selebre; kan move dimoun pran pouvwar, lepep prefer kasiet.
28.13: Seki kasiet so pese zame pou progrese; me seki rekonet so fot e desid pou sanze, so pese pou pardone.
28.14: Bienere dimoun ki gagn per pou fer lemal; me bann leker dir ki pa oule sanze, pou rwine.
28.15: Enn move dirizan ki fer dominer ar lepep malere, li kouma enn zanimo feros anraze.
28.16: Enn lider bet fer dominer pou li vinn ris lor ledo bann pov; me dirizan ki deteste larzan mal-gagne, pou viv lontan.
28.17: Enn dimoun ki ena disan lor so lame, li bizin pey pou so krim ziska li mor.
28.18: Dimoun onet pena pou per nanye; me bann malonet pou tom dan trou.
28.19: Seki travay so later, pa pou mank manze; me seki perdi letan kas poz, pou touzour malere.
28.20: Dimoun onet pou gagn boukou benediksion; me bann ki rod vinn ris tro vit, pou gagn zot pinision.
28.21: Get ar de lizie, li enn move zafer; malerezman, ena ki pran gous pou donn faver.
28.22: Enn dimoun peng galoup deryer larzan; me li pa kone ki maler deryer laport.
28.23: Avek letan, nou pou pli apresie enn remark sinser; ki enn dimoun ki pas diber.
28.24: Zanfan ki kokin so paran e ki dir: “pa enn pese sa,” li pa pli bon ki enn bandi.
28.25: Enn dimoun ki nek rod plin so pos, kre zizani; me seki met so konfians dan LESEGNER pou gagn benediksion.
28.26: Dimoun bet krwar li enn terib; me dimoun saz konn sorti dan danze.
28.27: Seki ed bann pov zame mank nanye; me seki ferm lizie divan lamizer lezot, pou gagn malediksion.
28.28: Kan diktater pran pouvwar, dimoun al kasiet; me kan li mor, boukou bon lider leve.

29.1: Seki touletan rezinbe kan gagn repros, maler pou tom lor li antret. Okenn remed pa pou sap so lavi.
29.2: Kan bann dimoun drwat opouvwar, lepep ena lazwa dan leker; me kan enn diktater gouverne, lepep pas mizer.
29.3: Zenes ki rod lasazes, fer so paran kontan; me zenes ki frekant prostitie, gaspiy tou so larzan.
29.4: Lerwa ki gouvern ar lazistis, fer so pei prospere; me dirizan ki tom dan koripsion, fer so pei rekile.
29.5: Dimoun ki nek met dan siro, pe rod met so prosin dan leto.
29.6: Si to viv dan lemal, to pou may dan to prop piez; me si to viv onet, to pena traka e to kapav selebre dan lazwa.
29.7: Bann bon dimoun rekonet drwa bann pov; bann move dimoun tro bet pou konpran sa.
29.8: Bann konploter, fasil zot soulev enn emet dan pei; me bann saz fer tou pou kalme lakoler lepep.
29.9: Twa ki saz, pa gagn zafer avek enn bet; li pou kriye, zoure ek rikane, e to pa pou trouv okenn solision.
29.10: Bann asasin deteste dimoun onet; me bann zis protez zot.
29.11: Enn dimoun bet sap lor kal brit; enn dimoun saz konn kontrol so lemosion.
29.12: Si enn dirizan ekout palab, tou so lantouraz pou vinn malonet.
29.13: Pov ek opreser ena enn kiksoz an-komin: LESEGNER finn fer toulede trouv soley.
29.14: Enn dirizan ki pa kraz bann pov, li pou regne lontan.
29.15: Disiplinn ek koreksion bien inportan pou edik zanfan; enn zanfan malelve fer so mama onte.
29.16: Kan move dimoun pran pouvwar, krim ogmante; me enn zour zot pou tonbe, e bann bon dimoun pou temwin.
29.17: Disiplinn to zanfan bien, to pou konn lape; zot pou met lazwa dan to leker.
29.18: Kan dirizan pena vizion, lepep pena kontrol; me bienere dimoun ki respekte lalwa Bondie.
29.19: Zis parol pa ase pou koriz enn ti-lespri; li kapav tande, me li pa pou sanze.
29.20: Milfwa to gagn zafer ek enn ignoran, ki to gagn zafer ek enn dimoun ki koze san reflesi.
29.21: Si touletan to donn to travayer tou seki li dimande, enn zour li pou fer grannwar ar twa.
29.22: Dimoun ki sap lor kal vit, li amenn dezord; e dimoun ki sofe vit, li sem diskord.
29.23: Kan to viv ek lorgey, enn zour to pou abese; me si to viv ek limilite, enn zour to pou onore.
29.24: Si to konplis enn voler, to lavi bien amer; to kone Bondie pou pini twa, me to pa kapav devwale # 29:24 Levitik 5 : 1 - 6, kapav ed nou konpran sa verse la pli bien. .
29.25: Si nou per lezot, nou lavi pieze; me si nou fer LESEGNER konfians, nou ansekirite.
29.26: Dimoun rod faver bann ki dan pouvwar; me zis LESEGNER ki donn li seki li merite.
29.27: Bann dimoun onet ay linzistis; me bann malfeter ay dimoun onet.

30.1: Bann parol solanel Agour, garson Yake. Ala seki sa zom la ti dir: Bondie, mo dekouraze! Twa, to pa la! Kouma mo pou viv? # 30:1 Sa fraz la, so Ebre pa kler. Ena tradiksion finn ekrir: “Ala seki sa zom la ti dir ek Ityel, Ityel ek Oukal.”
30.2: Li vre ki mo pli bet ki bann lezot dimoun; mo pena disernman ki lezot ena.
30.3: Mo pena lasazes e mo pa konn nanye lor Bondie.
30.4: Eski kikenn finn deza mont dan lesiel, apre finn redesann? Eski kikenn finn deza may divan dan so pla lame? Eski kikenn finn deza anvlop lamer dan so linz? Kisann-la ki finn mizir later e donn li so limit? Kouma li apele? Kisann-la so zanfan? Si to kone, dir mwa!
30.5: Tou seki Bondie dir, li vre; li enn boukliye pou dimoun ki rod so sekour.
30.6: Pa azout nanye ar parol Bondie, sinon, li pou repros twa e to pou pas pou enn manter.
30.7: Bondie, mo dimann twa zis de kitsoz; akord mwa sa avan mo mor:
30.8: Pa les mwa dir bann foste ek bann mansonz; pa fer mwa vinn ni tro ris ni tro pov. Donn mwa zis manze ki mo bizin pou viv.
30.9: Si mo vinn tro ris, mo kapav bliye twa SEGNER . E si mo vinn tro pov, mo kapav vinn enn voler e dezonor twa, mo Bondie.
30.10: Pa fer palab kont enn travayer ar so patron; sinon, travayer-la pou modi twa, e to pou peye pou sa.
30.11: Ena dimoun ki modi zot papa; e pena respe pou zot mama.
30.12: Ena dimoun ki krwar zot parfe, me anverite, zot sal ar pese.
30.13: Ena dimoun ki ranpli ar lorgey; zot get lezot ar mepri.
30.14: Ena dimoun, koumadir zot ena ledan rekin, ouswa ledan enn zanimo feros. Telman zot dominer, zot oule devor tou bann pov; zot oule fini tou bann malere.
30.17: Zanfan ki mepriz so papa, e dezobeir so mama, korbo pou bek so lizie e votour pou devor so kadav.
30.20: Ala manier enn adilter: Li manze, li souy so labous, e li dir: “Mo pa finn fer nanye demal!”
30.24: Lor later, ena kat kreatir ki bien tipti, me zot bien debrouyar:
30.25: bann fourmi kapav feb, me dan lete, zot konn ramas manze pou letan dir;
30.26: bann daman pena pouvwar, me zot konn aranz zot lakaz dan fant ros;
30.27: sotrel pena sef, me zot deplase kouma solda dan parad;
30.28: sitan bann geko # 30:28 Geko: enn ti-lezar. tipti, to kapav trap zot dan to lame, me pourtan, zot kapav rant dan pale lerwa.
30.32: Si to finn deklar tenor kouma bann bet, si to finn tir plan pou fer lezot dimal, aster, ferm labous, res trankil!
30.33: Kan to bat lakrem dile, to gagn diber; kan to gagn kou lor nene, disan koule; me kan to provok lakoler, to ava gagn lager.

31.1: Ala bann parol solanel ki mama Lerwa Lemouel ti ansegn li:
31.2: Ki mo pou dir twa mo garson? Mo finn met twa lor later; mo ti priye pou gagn twa e mo lapriyer finn exose. Asterla, ekout mwa!
31.3: Pa fini to kouraz ar bann fam; pa depans to kas ar zot; sa manier lamem ki boukou lerwa finn rwine.
31.4: Lemouel, fodepa ki lerwa tom dan lalkol; fodepa dirizan kontan labwason for;
31.5: sinon, dan soulezon, zot pou bliye seki lalwa dir; e zot pou maltret bann pov.
31.6: Donn lalkol dimoun ki pe mor, donn divin dimoun ki dan tristes;
31.7: les zot bwar pou ki zot bliye zot mizer, pou ki zot bliye zot lapenn.
31.8: Vinn portparol bann dimoun san parol; defann bann dimoun ki finn abandone.
31.9: Koz pou zot! Ziz ar lazistis! Pa ezite pou defann drwa bann dimoun mizer.
31.10: Li bien difisil trouv enn fam parfe! Li pli presie ki bann bizou gran valer.
31.11: So mari fer li foul konfians, e zame li pa pou mank nanye.
31.12: Fam-la pou bon avek so mari ziska so dernie souf; zame li pou fer li dimal.
31.13: Li rod bon lalenn ek bon latwal an-lin; li gagn lazwa pou travay ek so lame.
31.14: Li kouma bato marsandiz; li amenn so manze depi lwin.
31.15: Li lev boner gramatin, pou prepar manze so fami; e li organiz travay bann servant.
31.16: Li kone kan kapav aste enn later; ar so prop lamone, li fer plant enn karo rezin.
31.17: Li travay ar kouraz; e zame li pa res nanye-fer.
31.18: Li veye ki so travay fer profi; so lalanp res alime ziska tar dan aswar.
31.19: Li fabrik so prop difil; li tis so prop latwal.
31.20: Li zenere ar dimoun pov; li pa ezite pou ed bann malere.
31.21: Li pa per kan lanez tonbe dan liver; parski, dan so lakaz, tou dimoun ena bon linz.
31.22: Li fabrik dra lili ek molton; bann linz an-lin ki li mete, enn veritab bote.
31.23: So mari ena bon repitasion e li sieze parmi bann lider dan pei.
31.24: Fam la koud linz e li fabrik sintir; li vann zot ar bann marsan.
31.25: Li enn fam for ki tou dimoun respekte; so lavenir asire.
31.26: Li koz avek lasazes; li donn lansegnman avek bonte.
31.27: Li pran bien swin so fami; lapares pa koste ar li.
31.28: So bann zanfan ador li; so mari admir li e felisit li.
31.29: Mari la dir li: “Ena boukou fam ki fer bon travay, me twa, to depas zot enn may.”
31.30: Laparans tronper; labote efemer; me enn fam ki respekte LESEGNER , merit nou loner.
31.31: Rekonpans li pou so louvrwaz; e felisit li anpiblik pou so travay.
